items.title: Trump seeks to slow confirming his pick for spy chief and delay hearing
items.summary: The Senate intelligence committee chair said Jay Clayton's hearing will proceed "unless the president directs him not to appear or withdraws his nomination".
items.titleZh: 特朗普试图放慢确认他对间谍局长的选择并推迟听证会
items.summaryZh: 参议院情报委员会主席表示，杰伊·克莱顿的听证会将继续进行，“除非总统指示他不要出席或撤回提名”。

items.title: Collecting robot training data is dirty, unglamorous work. Some AI labs are already paying XDOF to do it
items.summary: Collecting robot training data is dirty, unglamorous work. Some AI labs are already paying XDOF to do it | TechCrunchtechcrunch.com
items.titleZh: 收集机器人训练数据是一项肮脏、乏味的工作。一些人工智能实验室已经付钱给XDOF来做这件事
items.summaryZh: 收集机器人训练数据是一项肮脏、乏味的工作。一些人工智能实验室已经付钱给XDOF来做这件事了| TechCrunchteccrunch.com

items.title: BitGo stock surges on $50 million share buyback as value languishes 65% below IPO price
items.summary: The buyback comes as newly public digital-asset firms face a tougher environment, with crypto markets lagging and investor attention shifting toward AI stocks.
items.titleZh: BitGo股票因5000万美元的股票回购而飙升，价值比IPO价格低65%
items.summaryZh: 此次回购正值新上市的数字资产公司面临更严峻的环境之际，加密货币市场滞后，投资者的注意力转向人工智能股票。

items.title: Lucid Cosmos design revealed in patent filing ahead of 2026 launch
items.summary:
Lucid has registered the design of its upcoming Cosmos with the European Union Intellectual Property Office, giving us the clearest look yet at the sub-$50,000 crossover the automaker is betting its future on.
The filing, published last week, shows the produc…
items.titleZh: Lucid Cosmos的设计在2026年发射前的专利申请中披露
items.summaryZh: Lucid已在欧盟知识产权局注册了其即将推出的Cosmos的设计，这让我们对该汽车制造商押注其未来的5万美元以下的跨界车有了最清晰的了解。

items.title: OpenAI’s backers spent $7.6 million to destroy a state legislator. Anthropic spent $10 million to rescue him
items.summary: Alex Bores passed New York's toughest AI safety law — he's also a millionaire former Palantir employee. The proxy war is happening in Manhattan.
items.titleZh: OpenAI的支持者花费760万美元摧毁了一名州议员。Anthropic花了1000万美元救了他
items.summaryZh: Alex Bores通过了纽约最严厉的人工智能安全法，他也是百万富翁的前Palantir员工。代理战争正在曼哈顿发生。

items.title: A macro strategist lays out 3 'boring' trades set to thrive as speculation fizzles in the 2nd half of 2026
items.summary: Richard Bernstein suggests a conservative investment strategy, favoring dividend stocks and non-US equities amid the market's speculative frenzy.
items.titleZh: 一位宏观策略师列出了3笔“无聊”的交易，随着投机在2026年下半年破灭，这些交易将蓬勃发展
items.summaryZh: Richard Bernstein建议采取保守的投资策略，在市场投机狂潮中青睐股息股票和非美国股票。

items.title: We finally got to drive the Aptera solar electric car
items.summary: After a very long wait, Aptera’s solar car is finally rolling and ready for journalist drives. So we headed down to San Diego to check out how development is going on this unique solar electric vehicle.
items.titleZh: 我们终于开上了Aptera太阳能电动汽车
items.summaryZh: 经过漫长的等待，Aptera的太阳能汽车终于开始行驶，准备供记者驾驶。因此，我们前往圣地亚哥，了解这种独特的太阳能电动汽车的开发情况。

items.title: Jeff Bezos is backing a two-year-old Cambridge AI lab at a $2.6bn valuation
items.summary: Jeff Bezos appears to have settled on his AI thesis, and it is not chatbots. It is the physical world. CuspAI, a two-year-old Cambridge startup that uses AI to design new materials, is in talks to raise about $400mn at a $2.6bn valuation, the Financial Times …
items.titleZh: 杰夫·贝佐斯以26亿美元的估值支持一家成立两年的剑桥人工智能实验室
items.summaryZh: Jeff Bezos似乎已经确定了他的人工智能理论，而不是聊天机器人。这是物质世界。CuspAI是一家成立两年的剑桥初创公司，利用人工智能设计新材料，据英国《金融时报》报道，该公司正在谈判以26亿美元的估值筹集约4亿美元…

items.title: Exclusive: A 21-year-old Stanford grad just raised $11 million to put a hormone lab on your wrist
items.summary: As Oura and WHOOP expand into women's health, startup Clair Health has raised $11 million to build a wearable designed from the ground up to continuously model hormonal cycles.
items.titleZh: 独家报道：一名21岁的斯坦福大学毕业生刚刚筹集了1100万美元，将一个激素实验室放在你的手腕上
items.summaryZh: 随着Oura和WHOOP扩展到女性健康领域，初创公司Clair health筹集了1100万美元，用于打造一款从头开始设计的可穿戴设备，以持续模拟荷尔蒙周期。
